name: Fitness Center – 21 Area
description: Full-service fitness center serving 21 Area. Free weights, cardio equipment, resistance machines, and locker rooms. 24/7 access available with CAC.

name: Fitness Center – 31 Area
description: Fitness center in 31 Area with free weights, cardio machines, and group exercise space. 24/7 CAC access.

name: Fitness Center – 33 Area
description: Fitness center in 33 Area featuring cardio, strength equipment, and functional training space.

name: Fitness Center – 41 Area
description: High-traffic fitness center in 41 Area. Extended weekend hours. Free weights, machines, and cardio deck.

name: Fitness Center – 43 Area
description: Fitness center in 43 Area with full weight room and cardio equipment. 24/7 access.

name: Fitness Center – 52 Area
description: Fitness center serving 52 Area with free weights, selectorized machines, and cardio equipment.

name: Fitness Center – 53 Area
description: Fitness center in 53 Area. Cardio and strength equipment available. 24/7 CAC access.

name: Fitness Center – MCAS
description: Fitness center at MCAS Camp Pendleton. Weekday-only staffed hours; 24/7 CAC access.

name: Fitness Center – 14 Area
description: Fitness center in 14 Area with full cardio and weight training facilities.

name: Fitness Center – 22 Area
description: Fitness center in 22 Area. Full weight room and cardio equipment. 24/7 access.

name: Fitness Center – 62 Area
description: Fitness center in 62 Area with strength and cardio equipment. 24/7 CAC access.

name: Paige Field House
description: Camp Pendleton's flagship fitness facility. Full competition gymnasium, Olympic weight room, turf training area, racquetball courts, sauna, and group exercise studios. Premier destination for serious athletes.

name: Group Exercise Classes
facility: Paige Field House / Multiple Fitness Centers
description: Instructor-led group fitness classes including yoga, spin, HIIT, Zumba, kickboxing, and boot camp. Schedule varies by location.
hours: Varies by class — see weekly schedule

name: Warrior Athlete Readiness & Resilience (WARR)
description: Evidence-based performance training program for warfighters. Combines strength, conditioning, and resilience coaching to optimize operational readiness.

name: Massage Services
description: Licensed massage therapy for recovery and wellness. Swedish, deep tissue, and sports massage. Appointments required.

name: Leatherneck Lanes
description: Full-service bowling center with 24 lanes, arcade, snack bar, and lounge. Cosmic bowling on Friday and Saturday nights. League play available.

name: Marine Memorial Golf Course
description: 18-hole championship golf course with driving range, pro shop, and clubhouse. One of the top military golf courses in California. Tee times required on weekends.

name: Lake O'Neill Day Pass
description: Day access to Lake O'Neill for fishing, swimming, and lakeside recreation. Boat rentals available. California fishing license required for fishing.

name: Del Mar Beach Cottages
description: Beachfront cottage rentals at Del Mar Beach. Fully equipped units sleeping 4–8 guests. Direct beach access, fire pits, and BBQ areas. Book well in advance — high demand.

name: San Onofre Beach Cottages
description: Rustic beach cottages at San Onofre. Surfing, sunbathing, and coastal hiking. One of Southern California's most prized surf breaks. Reserve early.

name: 13 Area Pool
description: Outdoor Olympic-size competition pool. Open lap swim, recreational swim, and swim lessons. Lifeguards on duty during all open hours.

name: 21 Area Pool
description: Community pool serving 21 Area residents. Lap lanes, open recreational swim, and family swim sessions.

name: Outdoor Adventures Equipment Rental
description: Equipment rental for camping, surfing, kayaking, stand-up paddleboarding, and more. Guided trip planning available. Reserve gear online or in-person.

name: Stepp Stables Trail Rides
description: Guided horseback trail rides through the scenic hills of Camp Pendleton. Beginner-friendly. Reservations required. Helmets provided.

name: Iron Mike's
description: Full-service sit-down restaurant on Camp Pendleton. American cuisine with daily specials, full bar, and private event dining. Popular for family celebrations and unit dinners.

name: Pub 1795
description: Casual bar and grill with a rotating tap selection, pub fare, and big-screen sports viewing. Walk-ins welcome. Private event space available.

name: Windmill Canyon
description: Upscale dining with panoramic views. California cuisine with seasonal menus. Popular for retirement ceremonies, promotion dinners, and special occasions. Reservations recommended.

name: Pacific Views Event Center
description: Premier event venue for weddings, military balls, retirement ceremonies, and large group events. Panoramic ocean and hillside views. Catering, AV, and event planning services included.

name: Child Development Center – CDC-1 Mainside
description: Full-day childcare for infants through preschool age. NAEYC-accredited. Structured curriculum, nutritious meals, and dedicated developmental staff. Waitlist currently active.

name: Child Development Center – CDC-2 Las Pulgas
description: Full-day childcare in Las Pulgas area. Serves infants through preschool. Income-based sliding scale fees. Limited openings — waitlist advised.

name: Child Development Center – CDC-3 San Onofre
description: Full-day childcare center serving the San Onofre housing area. Infant through preschool programs. Warm, home-like environment with outdoor play areas.

name: School Age Care
description: Before and after school care for K–5th grade. Summer camp programs available. Transportation to/from on-base schools. Homework help and enrichment activities.

name: Youth & Teen Program
description: Drop-in and structured programs for youth ages 6–18. Sports, arts, STEM activities, leadership development, and social events. Low-cost and free options available.

name: Single Marine Program – Recreation Events
description: Free and low-cost recreational and social events for single Marines and sailors. Concerts, theme park trips, sporting events, hiking, and community outings.
hours: Events scheduled weekly — see SMP calendar

name: Marine Corps Exchange (MCX) – Main Store
description: Full-service department store with electronics, clothing, home goods, sporting goods, and more. Tax-free shopping for eligible patrons. Military pricing on all items.

name: Marine Mart
description: On-base convenience stores with snacks, beverages, household essentials, and quick grab-and-go items. Multiple locations throughout Camp Pendleton.

name: ITT / Latitudes Travel Desk
description: Discounted tickets and travel packages — theme parks, sporting events, concerts, hotels, rental cars, and vacation packages. Exclusive military pricing not available to civilians.
